workshoptitle: Build Media Intelligence with Oracle Database 26ai

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: The Seer Media intelligence story and workshop goals.

tutorials.title: Getting Started
tutorials.description: Launch the environment and open Database Actions SQL Worksheet.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Media Data Foundation
tutorials.description: Inspect the media schema foundation and current object families.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Launch Operations Dashboard
tutorials.description: Query dashboard KPIs, audience momentum, and content exposure evidence.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Campaign Order Documents
tutorials.description: Use JSON Relational Duality and SQL/JSON for campaign documents.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Audience Signal Intelligence
tutorials.description: Run AI Vector Search over content and audience-signal embeddings.

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Creator Influence Network
tutorials.description: Use Property Graph and SQL/PGQ to analyze creator reach.

tutorials.title: Lab 6: Rights and Distribution Coverage
tutorials.description: Use Oracle Spatial for distribution hub and demand region analysis.

tutorials.title: Lab 7: Predictive Demand and Revenue
tutorials.description: Inspect and score OML models inside Oracle Database.

tutorials.title: Lab 8: Conclusion
tutorials.description: Turn the media labs into a practical converged database takeaway.

tutorials.title: Lab 9: Final Quiz
tutorials.description: Check your understanding with scored questions.

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Solutions to common problems and directions for receiving Live Help.
